items.title: Draft IC extended email for Octane covering founder profile and cap table
items.context: Email from Stephanie on May 6: 'Can you help me draft an email to IC extended in advance of the weekend. I want to get a feel for Logan's comfort with founder profile and cap table before doing too much.'

items.title: Assess Octane competitor landscape in detail
items.context: Email from Stephanie on May 6: 'I've not assessed their competitors in much detail to assess how thorough their comp analysis is. Let me know what you think.'

items.title: Follow up with Orchid on new term sheet updates after Roy's travel ends late May
items.context: Email from Roy Katmor on May 6: 'We passed on a TS this week as the terms didn't align with our backers, but I'm expecting a few more to crop up in the coming weeks. Travel over the next two weeks will slow things down a bit.'

items.title: Discuss internally whether to preempt VanishID round given strong Q1 results
items.context: Email from Matt Polak on Apr 28: 'Are you interested in preempting?' Q1 FY27 actuals: $1.17M new ARR (148% of forecast), ending ARR $5.92M, 125% YoY growth, 136% NRR. Matt says 'bullish insiders have asked for 50% or more of the round.'

items.title: Ensure Ashwin sends Brian Sykes (NextEra) a booking link for post-vacation meeting
items.context: Email from Brian Sykes (NextEra) on May 4: 'I'll be on vacation starting Tuesday but would be happy to chat once I'm back. Do you have a link where I can book time?'

items.title: Prep for Aembit <> CTC meeting on May 14 at 4pm PT
items.context: Email thread on May 7 re: 'Aembit <> CTC' — meeting confirmed for May 14 at 4pm PT between Aembit (Katlyn Diaz) and CTC (Takahashi).

items.title: Prep for Fin Capital & U.S. Bank Quarterly Leadership Call on May 11
items.context: Calendar event 'Fin Capital & U.S. Bank | Quarterly Leadership Call' on May 11 at 3-4pm ET with 26+ attendees from both teams including senior leadership.

items.title: Prep for GetReal & FinCapital Investor Briefing on May 11
items.context: Calendar event 'GetReal & FinCapital | Investor Briefing' on May 11 at 1-2pm ET with GetReal leadership team (CEO Matt Moynahan, CSO Hany Farid, CRO Jim).
